content.question: To what extent does the current SNI funding architecture (counting SNI pupils as 2–3 pupils for subsidy calculation) create structural over-identification incentives, and how do identification rates vary between schools/regions with different financial capacity and school-size profiles?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a regression analysis linking school-level SNI identification rates to per-pupil funding exposure, teacher-salary pressures, and school size; compare identification patterns in districts with high vs. low teacher shortages; interview school administrators on factors influencing assessment requests.
